archetype.name: Assassin
archetype.note: This archetype offers Poison Resistance at a different level than displayed here.

archetype.name: Poisoner
archetype.note: This archetype offers Poison Resistance at a different level than displayed here.

feat.name: Poison Resistance
feat.text: Your affinity for the natural world grants you protection against some of its dangers. You gain poison resistance equal to half your level, and you gain a +1 status bonus to saving throws against poisons.

traits.name: Alchemist
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the alchemist class.

traits.name: Druid
traits.text: This indicates abilities from the druid class.

sections.name: Archetype Use
sections.text: This feat can be used for one or more archetypes in addition to the listed classes. When selected this way, the feat does not have its class traits.
